name: guarantor_name_present
expression: guarantor_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(guarantor_name)) > 0
description: Guaranty agreement must identify the guarantor.

name: borrower_name_present
expression: borrower_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(borrower_name)) > 0
description: Borrower should be captured to link guaranty to the obligation.

name: maximum_liability_positive
description: Liability cap must be positive when present.

name: waivers_array_valid
description: Waivers should be represented as an array.

name: governing_law_present
expression: governing_law IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(governing_law)) > 0
description: Governing law should be captured for enforceability review.
